text: Hi! I ordered a gift box from Birchwood Valley Inn last week — can you tell me if it's been shipped yet? Name is Colleen Lane.
Hi Colleen! Thanks for reaching out 😊 Yes, your gift box shipped yesterday via UPS. Your tracking number is 1Z9F3A060357842015. Estimated delivery is July 1st!
Perfect, thank you so much! I'll keep an eye on it.
Hi, this is Brian Lane. I stayed at Birchwood Valley Inn last weekend and was charged for a minibar I never used. Can I get a refund for that?
Hi Brian! Thanks for reaching out. We're sorry for the inconvenience. Could you please share your booking confirmation number so we can look into that charge right away?
Sure, it's BVI-48821. The charge was $24. I didn't touch anything in the minibar, I promise!
Hi, this is Pat Doyle-Harrison. Just wanted to confirm my reservation for this Saturday, June 28th. Is everything still good on your end?
Hello Pat! Yes, your booking at Birchwood Valley Inn is confirmed for Saturday, June 28th. We have you down for a deluxe room, check-in at 3:00 PM. 😊
Perfect, thank you! See you then.
Hi, I wanted to ask what your check-in hours are at Birchwood Valley Inn? Planning to arrive this Saturday.
Hi Dennis! 👋 Our front desk is open daily from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Early arrivals can be arranged — just let us know your ETA!
Perfect, we should be there around 3 PM. Thanks so much!
Hi, I wanted to ask if you still have the Deluxe King room available for the weekend of July 12th? Just the one night.
Hello Elaine! Yes, our Deluxe King room is available for July 12th. Would you like me to hold it for you while you decide?
That would be great, thank you! I'll confirm by this evening.
Hi, I just checked out this morning and haven't received my payment receipt yet. Could you please send it to this number? – Nancy Clifford
Hello Nancy! Thank you for staying with us at Birchwood Valley Inn. We'll resend your receipt right away — could you confirm the email address on your booking?
Yes, it's nancy.clifford.vt@gmail.com. Thanks so much!
Hi, this is Margaret — we checked out this morning, just confirming the final folio came through? [2/6]
Good morning. Your folio closed out clean this morning — nothing outstanding. I'll email a copy shortly. [2/6]
Thank you for a lovely stay at Birchwood. Could you email the receipt to me? [2/7]
Receipt is on its way to your email now. Safe travels home. [2/7]
Quick question — did we leave a grey scarf in room 204? [2/8]
Housekeeping found a grey scarf in 204 — I'll set it aside at the desk for you. [2/8]
We're driving up from the UK side of the family visit; is late check-in after 9pm alright? [2/9]
Late check-in is fine. I'll leave your key with the night clerk, Nancy. [2/9]
Confirming our booking for the Eleanor party, two nights, king room. [2/10]
You're all set — two nights, king room, confirmed. See you then. [2/10]
The directions from I-91 were perfect, thank you. We arrived just fine. [2/11]
Glad the directions worked. The Putney detour trips people up this time of year. [2/11]
Could you hold our bags until 3pm on checkout day? [2/12]
We can hold your bags until 3. Just leave them at the desk. [2/12]
Is breakfast included with the conference-rate rooms? [2/13]
Breakfast is included with the conference rate — 7 to 9:30 in the sunroom. [2/13]
We loved the foliage view. Booking the same room next October if we can. [2/14]
I'll flag October for you. Foliage weekends book early, so let me know soon. [2/14]
Merci — the front desk was so helpful with the taxi to the station. [2/15]
Happy to help. Peter Havens is a short walk and a local favorite. [2/15]
One more thing — is parking on-site or on the street? [2/16]
Parking is on-site, no charge — the lot behind the inn. [2/16]
Can you recommend a good dinner spot walkable from the inn? [2/17]
Confirmed. Thank you for choosing Birchwood. [2/17]
